value_chain_position: Optical networking platforms — sells WaveLogic coherent modems, 400G/800G DWDM line-systems and network management software for hyperscaler long-haul and metro AI traffic.
relative_comps: CIEN's WaveLogic coherent DSP is widely regarded as the technology leader in long-haul and submarine optical; Microsoft and AWS are anchor hyperscaler customers. 31% YoY growth and 15% FCF margin are strong for a hardware+software stack; margins lag pure-software peers but the coherent modem IP is genuinely difficult to replicate. Nokia and Infinera are the primary public competitors; Huawei is the only other coherent DSP leader but faces Western supply-chain exclusion. Space hint is marginal — CIEN does some submarine/LEO ground-segment adjacency but AI infrastructure is the primary driver.
